mapper.select: SELECT productid, category, name, description, image FROM product WHERE category = #{category}
SELECT productid, category, name, description, image FROM product WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
SELECT productid, category, name, description, image FROM product WHERE productid = #{productid}
SELECT productid, category, name, description, image FROM product
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product (productid, category, name, description, image) VALUES (#{productid}, #{category}, #{name}, #{description}, #{image})
